creator: freebsd@dns.company
text:
Created attachment 192630
knot-resolver 2.2.0

A new release of knot-resolver was released.
This patch:

 - updates accordingly
 - removes the patch, which is fixed upstream
 - adjusts my email address
 - closes PR 215627

Tested using poudriere on all current versions, on amd64 & i386.
